历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022 (Science), the minimum ranking was approximately 5563; in 2023 (Science), approximately 3897 (significantly moved forward); in 2024 (Physics Category), approximately 5494; in 2025 (Physics Category), approximately 5206. Over the past three years, rankings have fluctuated within the 5200–5500 range, with the abnormal forward shift in 2023 returning to normal. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 5206. Provincial Physics Category enrollment plan: 34 in 2022, 37 in 2023, 38 in 2024, 34 in 2025; 34 in 2026, unchanged from 2025. The plan has not expanded or contracted, with no significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; shares Shandong University's soft science main ranking approximately 22nd (stable from 2021–2026), belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. Shandong University (Weihai) shares Shandong University's reputation signal, with a slightly negative evaluation in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle (lingering impact of the study partner incident). Douyin heat total ranking 20th (high heat), with relatively large short video exposure and high application attention. Regarding filing anomalies, Shandong University experienced a cutoff in 2022 in Shaanxi and a 63-point drop in the science cutoff line in 2024 in Sichuan, but no direct cutoff records for the Weihai campus. Shares Shandong University's discipline evaluation results: Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, etc. Mathematics A+ is top-tier, strongly attracting science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended) and other engineering majors continue to be highly popular, highly matching the university's enrollment majors such as Electronic Information and Mathematics, boosting application heat. Total number of candidates in the province: approximately 117,407 in Physics Category in 2025, 167,000 total candidates in 2026. Estimated Physics Category proportion about 68% in recent years, so approximately 113,560 in Physics Category in 2026, a decrease of about 3.3% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition. Provincial control lines: 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch 360, special type 472; 2024 undergraduate batch 360, special type 480, basically stable. Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, not a provincial university, with no local enrollment preference. Candidates from Heilongjiang applying to out-of-province 985 universities need to consider regional preferences. The Weihai campus, located in a coastal livable city, has some appeal to candidates from Northeast China.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as historical rankings fluctuating around 5200, unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, a decrease of about 3.3% in provincial Physics Category candidates (slightly easing competition), slightly negative university reputation (mildly suppressing application enthusiasm), and high popularity of engineering majors (boosting competition), the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 5206. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 5236, with a range of 4736–5736.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Electronic Information (Intelligent Engineering New Engineering Experimental Class) (Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Science and Technology, Robotics Engineering)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- No other Physics Category enrollment majors currently (2026 Physics Category only has 3 major groups: Electronic Information 22, Mathematics 7, Physics 5).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, there are only 3 enrollment majors in Physics Category. Electronic Information (22) and Mathematics (7) are Tier 1 popular majors. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle range of the predicted interval (approximately 4736–5000) can focus on sprinting. Physics (5) is a Tier 2 safe choice. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the interval (above approximately 5500) should fill in cautiously.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022 (Liberal Arts), the lowest ranking was approximately 685; in 2023 (Liberal Arts), approximately 862; in 2024 (History Category), approximately 1093; in 2025 (History Category), approximately 1053. Overall, there is a backward trend (ranking numbers increase). Over the past 3 years, it has moved from 862 to 1053, a cumulative backward shift of about 191 places; in 2025, it slightly recovered by 40 places compared to 2024, with a baseline of about 1053. Provincial History Category enrollment plan: 2022 (Liberal Arts) 7 students, 2023 (Liberal Arts) 8 students, 2024 (History Category) 12 students, 2025 (History Category) 16 students; 2026 plan is 16 students, unchanged from 2025. In recent years, there has been continuous expansion (7→8→12→16), but in 2026, it remains flat for the first time, pausing the expansion trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; shares Shandong University's Soft Science main ranking of approximately 22nd, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. Shandong University (Weihai) shares the reputation signal of Shandong University, with a slightly negative evaluation in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle (lingering impact of the 'study partner' incident). Douyin popularity ranks 20th overall (high heat), indicating high application attention. Shares Shandong University's discipline evaluation results: Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Language and Literature A, Law A-, Applied Economics A-, Marxist Theory A, etc., with strong liberal arts advantage disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (differentiated wait-and-see), Chinese Language/Literature (recommended), Foreign Language and Literature (general wait-and-see) and other liberal arts majors show differentiated popularity, with Law and Chinese Language and Literature still being popular liberal arts directions. Provincial total examinees: 2025 History Category approximately 54,707; 2026 total examinees 167,000; estimated based on recent History Category proportion of about 32%, 2026 History Category approximately 53,440, a decrease of about 2.3% from 2025, slightly easing competition. Provincial control lines: 2025 History Category undergraduate batch 405 points, special type 480 points; 2024 undergraduate batch 410 points, special type 486 points; control lines are basically stable. Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, not a provincial university. The Weihai campus has a beautiful environment and pleasant climate, which has some appeal to examinees from Northeast China.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the historical backward trend of rankings, the first flat enrollment plan in 2026 (expansion paused), a slight decrease in provincial History Category examinees (competition slightly eased), a slightly negative school reputation (mild suppression), and strong liberal arts advantage disciplines (maintaining appeal), it is expected that the lowest ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 1053. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 1073, with a range of 912–1234.

Law and Chinese Language and Literature are the flagship liberal arts directions of this university, with intense competition.
